text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
"Our spring has come." I'm pretty sure I've heard
that in a song somewhere... One where good
things just happen, one after another...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But it really feels like the case, doesn't it,
Trainer? I guess it happens in real life too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After conquering the Osaka Hai, the spring Tenno
Sho, and the Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black is officially the Senior Spring Triple
Crown champion.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: It almost feels like things turned out a little too good to be true, but we did it, Trainer! We won all our races!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, thanks! There are a few people I really want
to be celebrated by, and that includes you, Dia...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: And one other person.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, there's someone else on your list? Who is it,
who is it?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Isn't it obvious, Teio? It's y—

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: T-T-TEIO?! What are you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm here for you, of course! I want to congratulate
you just as badly as you want me to congratulate
you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Way to go, Kita. You won the Senior Spring
Triple Crown! You pulled off something
incredible, and I'm so happy for you!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! I couldn't have done it
without you, Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well, while we're at it, here! I got you a present.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-what's this?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
A Teio-blend of special honeyade to
commemorate your victory! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I got an extra large portion of your favorite
flavor, so go on and drink up!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Aww, thank you so much! All right, I'll do a toast
with this honeyade!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Cheers! Gulp, gulp! Ahh, delish!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black downs her victory honeyade all at
once...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Um, Teio? This might be a bit greedy of me, but
could I ask you for one more congratulatory
present? Pretty please!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh? Sure. Lay it on me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well, um... This is kinda embarrassing to ask,
but...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Any minute now... Teio should be here any minute
now...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you, Kita.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, here I am, wearing the signature racewear I
had on when I won the Classic Double Crown.
Why'd you want me to wear it?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Thanks so much for changing! You look
just like you did back then!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Huh, you changed out of your school uniform too,
but why? What's the plan here?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Teio, would you please do a celebratory dance
with me in those clothes?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: La, la, la, laaa, la, la, la! ♪ Yaaay!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! You're silly, Kita. Why'd you want to do
this, anyway?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I mean, why wouldn't I want to dance with you,
looking just like you did during your peak?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
And since I'm wearing my regular clothes just like
I was back then, it's like I've been transported
back to the past!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
My heart feels so full and happy! Here I am,
dancing with my hero...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Even I can't believe how far I've come!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black looks like an innocent, joyful child
as she has the time of her life and dances her
heart out.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! It was so much fun doing the
Teio Step with you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome! I'm going to head out now. But
one quick thing, Kita.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Now that you've won the Senior Spring Triple Crown, it's you who's going to be idolized, not the other way around!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Give the others something to aspire to, okay?
Your trainer had better not slack off either!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Teio... I'll keep pushing forward! Count on it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Receiving a congratulatory gift from her hero
Tokai Teio... Kitasan Black couldn't have asked
for a better celebration this spring.
